name: ExtensionBasic_Created
title: R5: created additional types
description: R5: `Basic.created` additional types (dateTime) additional types from child elements (value)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Basic.created` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Basic.created` 0..1 `dateTime`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Basic.created` 0..1 `dateTime`
*  R4B: `Basic.created` 0..1 `date`
*  R4: `Basic.created` 0..1 `date`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Basic.created` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Basic.created` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Basic.created` do not cover the following types: dateTime.
The mappings for `Basic.created` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
While the source element matches Basic element path `` (``), the definitions are not compatible (source: `dateTime`:0..1 -> basic: `date`:0..1).
